cards.title: Evergreen - Agent Infrastructure
cards.notes:
Agent infrastructure and identity project.

**Artifacts (From openclaw/evergreen/):**
- `AGENT_RULES.md` - Path rules and API keys
- `agent_rules_complete.md` - Complete configuration
- `playwright-testing-setup.md` - Testing docs

**Active Work:**
- Session visibility bug - sessions_list returns 1 of 8 sessions
  - Workaround: Direct file access `~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/`
- Voice capabilities (TTS via sag/ElevenLabs)
- Claude Code CLI integration
- Codex CLI integration

**Completed:**
- WSL2/p9io Crash RCA (2026-05-16) - Fixed via nuclear WhatsApp reset

**To openclaw/evergreen/** - Send working files here
